creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Igor Ostapenko from comment #3)
FYI (for records):
This is what I replied to dch@ via Mastodon. Including the command line I've invoked. The same ports are found but including noises. But not started working on it

     ===== Quote =====
I basically don't run `make test`. So not sure actually, but see below.
Note that bfs is (mostly) faster alternative for find and rg (ripgrep) is (mostly) faster alternative for grep. Not always, though.

% bfs /usr/ports -name "Makefile*" -type f -exclude -name .git -exclude -name distfiles -exclude -name packages -exec rg -n kyua {} +
/usr/ports/mail/mlmmj/Makefile
30:TEST_DEPENDS=		kyua:devel/kyua \

/usr/ports/x11-wm/dwm/Makefile
16:TEST_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/libexec/atf-check:devel/kyua

/usr/ports/sysutils/zogftw/Makefile
26:				kyua:devel/kyua
34:	${SETENV} HOME=${WRKDIR} kyua test --kyuafile ${WRKSRC}/tests/Kyuafile

/usr/ports/devel/Makefile.fixlibkiwix
1118:    SUBDIR += kyua

/usr/ports/devel/Makefile
1167:    SUBDIR += kyua
/usr/ports/devel/kyua/Makefile
1:PORTNAME=	kyua
9:WWW=		https://github.com/jmmv/kyua/
34:CONFLICTS=	kyua-atf-compat kyua-cli kyua-testers
36:SUB_FILES=	kyua.conf
49:IGNORE=		kyua from base must be used for FreeBSD 14.x and newer
59:	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/etc/kyua
60:	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/kyua.conf \
61:		${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/etc/kyua/kyua.conf.sample

/usr/ports/devel/gcli/Makefile
14:TEST_DEPENDS=	kyua:devel/kyua
/usr/ports/devel/pkgconf/Makefile.orig
16:TEST_DEPENDS=	kyua:devel/kyua

/usr/ports/devel/pkgconf/Makefile
33:TEST_DEPENDS=	kyua:devel/kyua
%
     ===== End Quote =====
